rootCause: The Playwright preflight script only considered dist/client/_astro as proof of a built Astro app. Astro server output in this repo stores built assets under dist/server/_astro, so the preflight check falsely treated every run as unbuilt and triggered a full rebuild before each Playwright group.
resolution: Expanded build-artifact detection to accept dist/client/_astro, dist/_astro, and dist/server/_astro, then added unit coverage to lock in the no-rebuild behavior for server-mode builds.
